Records.description: Zigzag family, zigzag_L5_massless. phi^4 primitive Z_n: vertices 1..n+1; edges {i,i+1} for i=1..n, {i,i+2} for i=1..n-1, plus {1,n+1}. Vacuum graph, n loops (first Betti number), 2n edges. Z_3 = K4 = wheel W_3. NOTE: parts of the older self-energy literature count the same object differently and call our Z_6 a '5-loop zigzag'; n here is always the Betti number, anchored by Z_3 = K4 = 3 loops. Value = (441/8)*Zeta[7].

Results.normalization: phi^4 projective period at D=4 (Brown-Schnetz convention); normFactor=1; NOT comparable to dim-reg momentum-space vacuum integrals (those are scaleless/divergent)
